details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest small-dog kennel with 2x daily playtime
Task 2: Select suite with webcam and outdoor run under $90/night
Task 3: Purchase 10-day full-day daycare pass for large dog
Task 4: Create account and add dog profile
Task 5: Copy vaccination requirements for stays > 3 nights
Task 6: Choose cheaper option between sharing vs separate suites
Task 7: Add departure-day (or similar) add-on under $40 to 5-night stay
Task 8: Find nearest qualifying location and start boarding booking
Task 9: Book 2-night kennel with rating/review/price filters
Task 10: Apply first-time boarder promo and reach payment step
